item.name: Titanshell Crab
item.description:
Those wishing to sample the succulent meat inside must first contend with its near-impenetrable shell. Or alternatively, have the fishmonger do that part for them beforehand.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This crab is prized for the cloud-soft whiteness and delicacy of its meat. Unscrupulous fishmongers are known to boil cheaper specimens to simulate the crimson hue of its carapace, but a canny customer always checks the thickness of the shell.
